description_long: This is a striking red sports car with a low, aerodynamic profile and aggressive styling, featuring a wide front bumper, angular headlights, and a prominent hood vent. The car has a convertible design with two brown bucket seats and a detailed dashboard, emphasizing its high-performance nature. Along the sides, gold accent stripes add a dynamic visual flair, while the large rear wing spoiler and dual exhausts at the back reinforce its racing pedigree. The wheels are bold, with red rims and a five-spoke design, complementing the overall sporty aesthetic. The rear of the car is equipped with a diffuser and visible taillights, further enhancing its street-ready appearance. This vehicle is designed for speed and style, making it a standout in any urban environment.
description: A red, gold-accented convertible sports car with a large rear spoiler, aggressive front bumper, and five-spoke red wheels. Its low, aerodynamic build and detailed interior highlight its high-performance design.
description_view_0: Front three-quarter view showing the wide front bumper, angular headlights, hood vents, and open convertible interior with brown seats.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the large rear spoiler, dual exhausts, taillights, and the gold accent stripe along the side.
description_view_2: Rear side view focusing on the spoiler, dual exhausts, rear diffuser, and the open cockpit with visible steering wheel.
description_view_3: Front side view emphasizing the aggressive front bumper, hood vents, and the red five-spoke wheels.
attribute_wheel_design: five-spoke red alloy wheels with a bold, angular design
